name: FocusMCP Marketplace
description: Catalogue officiel des briques MCP FocusMCP.

bricks.name: agent
bricks.description: Agent registry — register AI agents with capabilities, list available agents, query capabilities.

tools.name: register
tools.description: Register an agent with name, capabilities list, and optional metadata.

capabilities.description: List of capability identifiers the agent can handle

metadata.description: Optional key-value metadata about the agent

tools.name: unregister
tools.description: Remove an agent from the registry by ID.

id.description: Unique identifier of the agent to remove

tools.name: list
tools.description: List all registered agents, optionally filtered by capability.

tools.name: capabilities
tools.description: Query which agents can handle a specific capability/task type.

bricks.name: aiteam
bricks.description: AI team coordination — loads dispatch, parallel, debate, review, agent for multi-agent orchestration.

bricks.name: autopilot
bricks.description: Autopilot workflow — autonomous task execution with reasoning, context management, and shell commands.

tools.name: plan
tools.description: Create an execution plan for a task — break it into steps with reasoning.

tools.name: execute
tools.description: Execute a plan step by step with reasoning at each stage.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Get autopilot status — current plan, completed steps, next step.

bricks.name: batch
bricks.description: Batch execution patterns — run multiple operations sequentially, in parallel, or as a pipeline.

tools.name: multi
tools.description: Execute multiple shell commands and collect all results. Each command runs independently.

tools.name: sequential
tools.description: Execute commands one by one. Stops on first failure unless continueOnError is set.

tools.name: parallel
tools.description: Execute all commands in parallel. Returns when all complete.

tools.name: pipeline
tools.description: Pipe stdout of each command into stdin of the next (shell pipe chain).

bricks.name: cache
bricks.description: In-memory file cache — avoid redundant disk reads with mtime-based invalidation.

tools.name: get
tools.description: Get a file from cache. Returns content + hit/miss status.

tools.name: set
tools.description: Force a file into the cache with given content.

tools.name: invalidate
tools.description: Invalidate one file or the entire cache (omit path to clear all).

path.description: File path to invalidate; omit to clear all

tools.name: warmup
tools.description: Pre-load a list of files into the cache.

paths.description: List of absolute file paths to cache

tools.name: stats
tools.description: Return cache metrics: entry count, total size, hit rate.

bricks.name: callgraph
bricks.description: Call graph analysis — callers, callees, call chains.

tools.name: callers
tools.description: Find which functions call this function (grep usage in files).

name.description: Function name to find callers for

tools.name: callees
tools.description: Find which functions this function calls.

tools.name: chain
tools.description: Find the call chain from function A to function Z.

tools.name: depth
tools.description: Find the maximum call depth of a function.

bricks.name: codebase
bricks.description: Complete codebase intelligence — loads treesitter, symbol, outline, callgraph, depgraph, refs.

bricks.name: codeedit
bricks.description: Precise code editing — replace function bodies, insert before/after, safe delete with dependency check.

tools.name: replacebody
tools.description: Replace the body of a function or method by name. Uses AST parsing for PHP; brace-matching for TS/JS/Python/Go/Rust/Java. Returns found=false with error if language is unsupported.

dryRun.description: When true, return preview only — never write to disk

tools.name: insertafter
tools.description: Insert code after a specific line number or after a pattern match. If the pattern matches multiple lines, returns inserted=false with a matches list; disambiguate via lineHint.

pattern.description: Regex pattern to insert after (alternative to line number)

lineHint.description: Preferred line number when pattern has multiple matches — picks the closest match

dryRun.description: When true, return diff only — never write to disk

tools.name: insertbefore
tools.description: Insert code before a specific line number or before a pattern match. If the pattern matches multiple lines, returns inserted=false with a matches list; disambiguate via lineHint.

lineHint.description: Preferred line number when pattern has multiple matches — picks the closest match

dryRun.description: When true, return diff only — never write to disk

tools.name: safedelete
tools.description: Delete a function or export, checking first if anything depends on it. Refuses if dependents exist.

dir.description: Project root to check for dependents

force.description: Delete even if dependents exist (default false)

dryRun.description: When true, return diff only — never write to disk

bricks.name: codemod
bricks.description: Code modification toolkit — loads symbol, rename, codeedit, inline, textsearch for automated refactoring.

bricks.name: compress
bricks.description: Compress text output to save tokens — strip comments, collapse whitespace, abbreviate patterns.

tools.name: output
tools.description: Strip comments, collapse whitespace, remove blank lines from code or text.

tools.name: response
tools.description: Compress a JSON tool response: strip null/undefined values, shorten paths, abbreviate keys.

tools.name: terse
tools.description: Ultra-compressed: keep ONLY identifiers, function names, type names. Strip all implementation.

bricks.name: contextpack
bricks.description: Pack files into a compressed context bundle — reduce token usage by extracting only signatures, maps, or full content.

tools.name: pack
tools.description: Pack multiple files into a single context string.

files.description: List of file paths to pack

mode.description: Pack mode: signatures (exports only), map (key lines), full (entire file). Default: signatures

tools.name: budget
tools.description: Given a token budget, pack as many files as possible.

tools.name: estimate
tools.description: Estimate pack size without actually packing.

tools.name: prioritize
tools.description: Sort files by relevance to a query.

bricks.name: convert
bricks.description: Convert between formats and units — unit conversion, encoding, format transformation, naming conventions.

tools.name: units
tools.description: Convert between units: bytes (B/KB/MB/GB), time (ms/s/m/h), or tokens with cost estimate.

from.description: Source unit: b, kb, mb, gb, ms, s, m, h, tokens

to.description: Target unit: b, kb, mb, gb, ms, s, m, h, tokens, cost

pricePerMillion.description: Token price per 1M tokens in USD (required when converting tokens→cost)

tools.name: encoding
tools.description: Encode or decode text using base64, hex, URL encoding, or HTML entities.

text.description: The text to encode or decode

tools.name: format
tools.description: Convert data between formats: JSON, CSV, and YAML.

data.description: The input data string to convert

tools.name: language
tools.description: Convert naming conventions between camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case, and PascalCase.

bricks.name: debate
bricks.description: Structured multi-perspective debate — define positions, score arguments, find consensus, summarize.

tools.name: debate
tools.description: Start a debate with a topic and an array of positions (role + argument).

role.description: Name or role of the debater

tools.name: consensus
tools.description: Find common ground between positions in a debate by extracting overlapping keywords and themes.

debateId.description: ID of the debate to analyze

tools.name: score
tools.description: Score each position on criteria (relevance, evidence, feasibility) from 1 to 10 and compute a weighted ranking.

debateId.description: ID of the debate to score

tools.name: summary
tools.description: Summarize the debate with winner, key points, and areas of agreement and disagreement.

debateId.description: ID of the debate to summarize

bricks.name: decision
bricks.description: Structured decision-making — define options, analyze tradeoffs, recommend, and record decisions.

tools.name: options
tools.description: Define options for a decision. Each option has a label and optional pros/cons.

tools.name: tradeoffs
tools.description: Add criteria and weights to evaluate options. Score each option against criteria.

tools.name: recommend
tools.description: Get a recommendation based on weighted scores.

tools.name: record
tools.description: Record the final decision with rationale. Persists to a JSON file.

outputPath.description: File path to save the decision record (optional)

bricks.name: depgraph
bricks.description: Dependency graph analysis — imports, exports, circular deps, fan-in/out.

tools.name: imports
tools.description: List all imports of a file.

tools.name: exports
tools.description: List all exports of a file.

tools.name: circular
tools.description: Detect circular dependencies in a directory.

tools.name: fanin
tools.description: Find which files import this file.

tools.name: fanout
tools.description: Count how many files this file imports.

bricks.name: devtools
bricks.description: Developer tools — loads shell, sandbox, batch for command execution and scripting.

bricks.name: diagram
bricks.description: Diagram generation — produce Mermaid, DOT/Graphviz, and ASCII diagrams from data.

tools.name: mermaid
tools.description: Generate a Mermaid diagram from structured data (flowchart, sequence, class, or graph).

type.description: Diagram type: flowchart, sequence, classDiagram, graph

direction.description: Graph direction: TB, BT, LR, RL (default TB)

tools.name: dot
tools.description: Generate a DOT/Graphviz diagram from structured data.

tools.name: ascii
tools.description: Generate a simple ASCII box-and-arrow diagram from nodes and edges.

bricks.name: dispatch
bricks.description: Task dispatch queue — send tasks, manage queue, cancel, check status for multi-step workflows.

tools.name: send
tools.description: Send a task to the dispatch queue. Returns a task ID.

tools.name: queue
tools.description: List all tasks in the queue, optionally filtered by status.

tools.name: cancel
tools.description: Cancel a pending or running task by ID.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Get detailed status of a specific task.

bricks.name: echo
bricks.description: Hello-world brick — returns the message it receives. Serves as a smoke test for the FocusMCP pipeline.

tools.name: say
tools.description: Returns the received message as-is. Useful as a canary to verify FocusMCP correctly dispatches tool calls end-to-end.

bricks.name: filediff
bricks.description: File comparison — diff, patch, delta between files or versions.

tools.name: diff
tools.description: Compare two files and return unified diff

tools.name: patch
tools.description: Apply a unified diff patch to a file

tools.name: delta
tools.description: Show only changed lines between two strings (compact)

bricks.name: filelist
bricks.description: List directory contents — entries, tree, glob, find.

tools.name: list
tools.description: List files and directories in a path

tools.name: tree
tools.description: Recursive directory tree

tools.name: glob
tools.description: Find files matching a glob pattern

tools.name: find
tools.description: Find files by name (substring match)

bricks.name: fileops
bricks.description: File operations — move, copy, delete, rename.

tools.name: move
tools.description: Move a file or directory to a new path

tools.name: copy
tools.description: Copy a file to a new path

tools.name: delete
tools.description: Delete a file or empty directory

tools.name: rename
tools.description: Rename a file within its parent directory

bricks.name: fileread
bricks.description: Read files — full, head, tail, line range, encoding detection.

tools.name: read
tools.description: Read entire file content

tools.name: head
tools.description: Read first N lines of a file

tools.name: tail
tools.description: Read last N lines of a file

tools.name: range
tools.description: Read specific line range from a file

bricks.name: filesearch
bricks.description: Search and replace in files — regex search, in-place replace.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search for a regex pattern in files

tools.name: replace
tools.description: Search and replace in a file

bricks.name: filesystem
bricks.description: Complete filesystem operations — loads fileread, filewrite, filelist, fileops, filesearch.

bricks.name: filewrite
bricks.description: Write files — create, overwrite, append.

tools.name: write
tools.description: Write content to a file (creates or overwrites)

tools.name: append
tools.description: Append content to end of a file

tools.name: create
tools.description: Create a new file. Fails if the file already exists by default (safe). Pass options.force=true to overwrite an existing file.

force.description: If true, overwrite the file if it already exists. Default: false.

bricks.name: format
bricks.description: Format data into various output formats — pretty JSON, YAML, markdown, ASCII tables.

tools.name: json
tools.description: Format and pretty-print JSON with optional key sorting and field filtering.

sortKeys.description: Whether to sort object keys alphabetically

tools.name: yaml
tools.description: Convert JSON data to YAML format.

data.description: JSON string to convert to YAML

tools.name: markdown
tools.description: Convert structured JSON data to markdown (headings, lists, or table).

data.description: JSON string to convert to markdown

style.description: Markdown style: list (default), table, or headings

tools.name: table
tools.description: Format tabular data as an ASCII table with +--+ borders and optional column alignment.

rows.description: Table rows as arrays of cell strings

bricks.name: fts
bricks.description: Full-text search with TF-IDF ranking — index files, search with relevance scoring, suggest completions.

tools.name: index
tools.description: Index a directory for full-text search. Reads supported files and builds an inverted index.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the index with a query. Returns ranked results with TF-IDF scores.

tools.name: rank
tools.description: Given a query and a list of file paths, rank them by relevance using the index.

tools.name: suggest
tools.description: Auto-complete a partial query using indexed terms.

bricks.name: fullaudit
bricks.description: Full project audit workflow — code quality review, security scan, architecture analysis, and metrics report.

tools.name: run
tools.description: Run a full audit on a project directory — code quality, security, architecture patterns.

tools.name: report
tools.description: Generate a markdown audit report from the last run.

bricks.name: graphbuild
bricks.description: Knowledge graph builder — construct a graph of code entities (files, functions, types) and their relationships.

tools.name: build
tools.description: Build a knowledge graph from a directory by scanning imports, exports, and call sites.

tools.name: update
tools.description: Incrementally update the graph for changed files without full rebuild.

tools.name: watch
tools.description: Return graph stats and detect stale nodes (files that no longer exist).

tools.name: add
tools.description: Manually add a node or edge to the graph.

tools.name: multimodal
tools.description: Return the graph in multiple formats: summary stats, node list, edge list.

bricks.name: graphcluster
bricks.description: Graph clustering — detect communities, explain groupings, identify architecture layers.

tools.name: cluster
tools.description: Detect clusters of tightly connected nodes using label propagation algorithm.

tools.name: communities
tools.description: List all detected communities with their members and interconnection density.

tools.name: explain
tools.description: Explain a cluster — what connects its members, common types, shared dependencies.

tools.name: architecture
tools.description: Detect architecture layers — group nodes by directory depth and dependency direction (top-down).

bricks.name: graphexport
bricks.description: Generate visualizations from a provided or upstream graph. For upstream graphs, use with graphbuild/callgraph/depgraph first. Alternatively, load an inline graph via ge_input(graph) to use standalone.

tools.name: input
tools.description: Load an inline graph (nodes + edges JSON) into ambient state for subsequent export tools. Use this to make graphexport standalone without an upstream graphbuild/callgraph/depgraph brick.

graph.description: Inline graph with nodes and edges arrays

tools.name: html
tools.description: Export graph as a standalone HTML page with a simple SVG visualization. Pass graph inline or rely on upstream graphbuild/callgraph/depgraph context.

tools.name: mermaid
tools.description: Export graph as Mermaid diagram syntax. Pass graph inline or rely on upstream graphbuild/callgraph/depgraph context.

tools.name: graphml
tools.description: Export graph as GraphML XML format. Pass graph inline or rely on upstream graphbuild/callgraph/depgraph context.

tools.name: cypher
tools.description: Export graph as Cypher CREATE statements (Neo4j compatible). Pass graph inline or rely on upstream graphbuild/callgraph/depgraph context.

tools.name: obsidian
tools.description: Export graph as Obsidian-compatible markdown files with [[wikilinks]]. Pass graph inline or rely on upstream graphbuild/callgraph/depgraph context.

tools.name: wiki
tools.description: Export graph as a single wiki-style markdown document with sections per node. Pass graph inline or rely on upstream graphbuild/callgraph/depgraph context.

bricks.name: graphquery
bricks.description: Knowledge graph query — find nodes, traverse neighbors, find paths, filter by type.

tools.name: query
tools.description: Query the graph with a pattern — find nodes by type, label substring, or connected to a specific node.

tools.name: node
tools.description: Get full details of a specific node by ID, including all edges.

tools.name: neighbors
tools.description: Find all nodes connected to a given node (incoming and outgoing edges).

tools.name: path
tools.description: Find shortest path between two nodes using BFS.

tools.name: filter
tools.description: Filter the graph to a subgraph matching criteria (node types, edge types).

bricks.name: heatmap
bricks.description: File access heatmap — track read/write patterns, detect hot and cold files.

tools.name: track
tools.description: Record a file access (read or write) with the current timestamp.

file.description: Absolute or relative path of the accessed file

tools.name: hotfiles
tools.description: Return the most frequently accessed files, optionally filtered by access type.

limit.description: Maximum number of files to return (default 10)

type.description: Filter by access type (omit for combined count)

tools.name: patterns
tools.description: Detect access patterns — files commonly accessed together within 1 second of each other.

tools.name: coldfiles
tools.description: Find files that have not been accessed within a given time threshold.

bricks.name: impact
bricks.description: Change impact analysis — given a file or symbol, find what files are affected by a change.

tools.name: analyze
tools.description: Analyze impact of changing a file: find direct and indirect dependents.

file.description: Absolute path to the changed file

tools.name: affected
tools.description: List all files affected by changes to the given set of files.

tools.name: propagate
tools.description: Trace how a change propagates through the dependency graph.

file.description: Absolute path to the changed file

bricks.name: inline
bricks.description: Inline, extract, and move refactoring — inline variables/functions, extract code to new functions, move between files.

tools.name: inline
tools.description: Inline a variable or simple function — replace all usages with the definition, then remove the definition.

name.description: Variable or function name to inline

tools.name: extract
tools.description: Extract lines from a file into a new named function. The original lines are replaced with a call.

tools.name: move
tools.description: Move a function or export from one file to another, updating imports in both files.

bricks.name: knowledge
bricks.description: Knowledge base — index documents, search by content, fetch entries, purge stale data, rank by relevance.

tools.name: index
tools.description: Index a document or note into the knowledge base with tags and metadata.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the knowledge base by query. Returns ranked results.

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Fetch a specific knowledge entry by ID.

tools.name: purge
tools.description: Remove entries older than a given age or matching specific tags.

olderThanDays.description: Remove entries older than N days

tools.name: rank
tools.description: Re-rank existing search results by additional criteria (recency, tag match, content length).

bricks.name: knowledgebase
bricks.description: Knowledge base — loads knowledge, fts, graphbuild, graphquery for document indexing and graph-powered search.

bricks.name: lastversion
bricks.description: Package version intelligence — latest version, diff, changelog, audit across npm/pypi/github/gitlab.

tools.name: latest
tools.description: Get the latest version of a package with metadata (date, deprecated flag, LTS flag, audit count).

source.description: Source: npm, pypi, github, gitlab, cargo, rubygems, gomod

tools.name: versions
tools.description: List all versions of a package, optionally filtered by semver range or stable-only.

tools.name: diff
tools.description: Compare two versions: bump type (patch/minor/major/breaking), days between, breaking change hints.

tools.name: changelog
tools.description: Fetch release notes aggregated between two versions (from GitHub Releases API).

tools.name: check
tools.description: Check if a currently installed version is outdated. Returns staleness analysis with bump type and days behind.

tools.name: audit
tools.description: Fetch security advisories for a package version (GitHub Advisory DB via OSV.dev).

source.description: Source: npm, pypi, github, cargo, gomod

bricks.name: memory
bricks.description: Persistent key-value memory — store and recall information across sessions as JSON files.

tools.name: store
tools.description: Save a key-value pair to persistent memory.

tools.name: recall
tools.description: Get a value by key from persistent memory.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search memories by query (substring match on key, value, and tags).

tools.name: forget
tools.description: Delete a memory entry by key.

tools.name: list
tools.description: List all memory keys, optionally filtered by tag.

bricks.name: metrics
bricks.description: Session metrics tracking — token usage, costs, duration, and per-tool statistics.

tools.name: session
tools.description: Get or reset session metrics summary.

reset.description: If true, reset all session metrics and return empty summary.

tools.name: tokens
tools.description: Track token usage — record input/output tokens per tool call.

tool.description: Name of the tool call being recorded.

tools.name: costs
tools.description: Calculate estimated costs based on token usage and model pricing.

inputPricePer1k.description: Cost per 1 000 input tokens in USD. Default: 0.003.

outputPricePer1k.description: Cost per 1 000 output tokens in USD. Default: 0.015.

tools.name: duration
tools.description: Track and report tool call durations.

tool.description: Filter duration stats to a specific tool name.

last.description: Return stats for the last N tool calls.

bricks.name: multiread
bricks.description: Batch file reading — multiple files in one call, deduplication.

tools.name: batch
tools.description: Read multiple files in one call

paths.description: List of file paths to read

tools.name: dedup
tools.description: Read multiple files, deduplicate shared imports/headers

tools.name: merge
tools.description: Read and concatenate files with separators

bricks.name: onboarding
bricks.description: Project onboarding workflow — auto-discover project structure, conventions, and key files for a new contributor or AI agent.

tools.name: scan
tools.description: Full project onboarding scan — detect framework, architecture, conventions, key files, and build a context summary.

tools.name: guide
tools.description: Generate a contributor guide based on scan results — what to read first, coding standards, key patterns.

bricks.name: outline
bricks.description: File and repo structure outline — list exported symbols and directory trees without reading full content.

tools.name: file
tools.description: Outline a single file: list exported symbols with line numbers, no body.

tools.name: repo
tools.description: Outline entire repo: per-file symbol summary.

tools.name: structure
tools.description: Directory structure with file counts per folder.

bricks.name: overview
bricks.description: Project-level understanding without reading all files — detect framework, language, conventions, and architecture.

tools.name: project
tools.description: Scan root dir and detect project metadata: name, framework, language, type, scripts, packageManager.

tools.name: architecture
tools.description: Scan directory structure, count files per folder, detect architectural patterns.

tools.name: conventions
tools.description: Read sample files and detect coding conventions: indent, quotes, semicolons, import style.

tools.name: dependencies
tools.description: Parse package.json and categorize dependencies: production, dev, framework, testRunner, linter, bundler.

bricks.name: parallel
bricks.description: Parallel execution coordination — run tasks concurrently, collect results, merge outputs, handle timeouts.

tools.name: run
tools.description: Run multiple shell commands in parallel with concurrency control.

tools.name: collect
tools.description: Collect and aggregate results from a previous parallel run.

runId.description: Run ID from a previous par_run call

tools.name: merge
tools.description: Merge multiple text outputs into one, with separators and optional dedup.

tools.name: timeout
tools.description: Set or check timeout configuration for parallel runs.

defaultMs.description: Default timeout per task in ms

runId.description: Check timeout status of a run

bricks.name: planning
bricks.description: Structured planning — create plans with steps, dependencies, and time estimates.

tools.name: create
tools.description: Create a new plan with a title and optional description.

tools.name: steps
tools.description: Add or list steps in a plan. Each step has a title, optional estimate, and status.

complete.description: Mark step at this index as done

tools.name: dependencies
tools.description: Define dependencies between steps — step B depends on step A.

from.description: Step index that must complete first

tools.name: estimate
tools.description: Get plan summary — total steps, completed, blocked, estimated time remaining.

bricks.name: refs
bricks.description: Cross-references — find who imports or uses a symbol, locate declarations, and trace inheritance chains.

tools.name: references
tools.description: Find all files that import or reference a symbol name.

tools.name: implementations
tools.description: Find implementations of an interface or type.

tools.name: declaration
tools.description: Find where a symbol is declared or exported.

tools.name: hierarchy
tools.description: Class or interface inheritance chain.

bricks.name: rename
bricks.description: Rename refactoring — rename symbols across files, rename files with import updates, bulk rename with preview.

tools.name: symbol
tools.description: Rename a symbol (function, variable, class, type) across all files in a directory. Dry run by default.

tools.name: file
tools.description: Rename a file and update all imports referencing it across the project.

newName.description: New filename (just the name, not full path)

dir.description: Project root to update imports in

tools.name: bulk
tools.description: Rename multiple symbols at once. Useful for coordinated renames.

tools.name: preview
tools.description: Preview what a symbol rename would change without any mutation. Shows affected files and line numbers.

bricks.name: repos
bricks.description: Multi-repo management — register, track, and get stats for multiple repositories.

tools.name: list
tools.description: List all registered repositories.

tools.name: register
tools.description: Register a repository path by name.

tools.name: unregister
tools.description: Remove a registered repository.

tools.name: stats
tools.description: Get file and line count statistics for a registered repository.

bricks.name: research
bricks.description: Multi-source research — collect info from multiple files/sources, synthesize findings, validate consistency.

tools.name: multisource
tools.description: Read multiple files and extract key information (exports, types, patterns) from each.

paths.description: Absolute paths to the files to read and analyze

tools.name: synthesize
tools.description: Combine findings from multiple sources into a structured summary.

sources.description: Array of source analysis objects from multisource

tools.name: validate
tools.description: Cross-check findings for consistency — conflicting types, unused exports, missing dependencies.

sources.description: Array of source analysis objects from multisource

bricks.name: review
bricks.description: Structured code review — analyze code quality, security, architecture patterns, compare versions.

tools.name: code
tools.description: Review a file for code quality — complexity, naming, patterns. Returns findings.

path.description: Absolute path to the file to review

tools.name: security
tools.description: Review a file for security issues — hardcoded secrets, eval, SQL injection patterns.

path.description: Absolute path to the file to review

tools.name: architecture
tools.description: Review directory structure for architecture patterns (layers, modules, coupling).

dir.description: Absolute path to the directory to review

tools.name: compare
tools.description: Compare two file versions and list what changed (additions, removals, modifications).

pathA.description: Absolute path to the first (original) file

pathB.description: Absolute path to the second (modified) file

bricks.name: routes
bricks.description: API route detection — scan projects for Express, Fastify, Next.js, SvelteKit route definitions.

tools.name: scan
tools.description: Scan a project directory and detect all API routes/endpoints with HTTP methods.

framework.description: Force framework (express, fastify, nextjs, sveltekit). Auto-detects if omitted.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search routes by path pattern or HTTP method.

tools.name: list
tools.description: List all detected routes in a compact table format.

tools.name: frameworks
tools.description: Detect which web frameworks are used in the project.

bricks.name: sandbox
bricks.description: Sandboxed code execution — run JavaScript/TypeScript snippets in an isolated VM context.

tools.name: run
tools.description: Execute a JavaScript or TypeScript snippet in a sandboxed VM context. TypeScript is auto-transpiled via esbuild. Returns the result of the last expression.

code.description: JavaScript or TypeScript code to execute

tools.name: file
tools.description: Read a file and execute it in the sandbox. Returns the module exports or last expression.

path.description: Path to JS/TS file to execute

tools.name: eval
tools.description: Evaluate a JavaScript or TypeScript expression and return its value. Lighter than run — single expression only. TypeScript is auto-transpiled via esbuild.

expression.description: JavaScript or TypeScript expression to evaluate

tools.name: languages
tools.description: List supported languages and their status.

tools.name: read
tools.description: Read a file from the current working directory (bounded — no absolute paths, no ../ escapes). Returns the file contents as a string. Use this to load source files from the codebase before processing them in the sandbox.

path.description: Relative path to the file within the working directory (e.g. 'src/utils.ts'). Absolute paths and directory traversal are rejected.

bricks.name: savings
bricks.description: Track and report token savings — compare FocusMCP usage vs naive full-read, trend over time, ROI.

tools.name: report
tools.description: Generate a savings report — tokens saved vs baseline for a session.

baselineTokens.description: Token count for naive full-read baseline

actualTokens.description: Token count actually consumed by FocusMCP

tools.name: compare
tools.description: Compare two sessions' efficiency — which saved more tokens.

sessionA.description: ID of the first session to compare

sessionB.description: ID of the second session to compare

tools.name: trend
tools.description: Show savings trend over multiple sessions — running average and direction.

last.description: Number of most recent sessions to include (default: all)

tools.name: roi
tools.description: Calculate return on investment — time/cost saved vs FocusMCP overhead.

bricks.name: semanticsearch
bricks.description: Semantic search using TF-IDF vector space — cosine similarity, intent matching, document similarity.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Semantic search — find documents most similar to a query using cosine similarity on TF-IDF vectors.

tools.name: similar
tools.description: Find documents most similar to a given document (by ID or text).

targetId.description: ID of document to find similar ones to

tools.name: intent
tools.description: Classify a query against a set of intents (intent = label + example phrases). Returns best matching intent.

tools.name: embeddings
tools.description: Generate TF-IDF vector representation of texts. Useful for debugging or external processing.

bricks.name: session
bricks.description: Session context save and restore — track loaded files and operations, persist sessions to disk.

tools.name: save
tools.description: Save current session state to disk.

tools.name: restore
tools.description: Restore a saved session from disk.

tools.name: context
tools.description: Get current in-memory session summary.

tools.name: history
tools.description: List all saved sessions.

bricks.name: share
bricks.description: Shared state for multi-agent — share context, files, results between agents, broadcast messages.

tools.name: context
tools.description: Share or retrieve shared context (key-value store visible to all agents). If value is provided, sets the key. Always returns the current value.

key.description: Context key to get or set

value.description: Value to store (JSON string). Omit to read.

tools.name: files
tools.description: Share file references between agents — register which agent owns or watches which files. If files are provided, registers them. Otherwise lists files for the agent.

agentId.description: Identifier of the agent registering or querying files

files.description: List of file paths to register for this agent. Omit to read.

tools.name: results
tools.description: Share task results — store and retrieve results by task ID. If result is provided, stores it. Otherwise retrieves the stored result.

result.description: Result to store (JSON string). Omit to read.

tools.name: broadcast
tools.description: Send a message to all registered listeners (in-memory pub/sub). The message is logged and delivered synchronously to all current listeners.

from.description: Identifier of the agent sending the message

bricks.name: shell
bricks.description: Shell command execution — run commands, background processes, kill, and compress output.

tools.name: exec
tools.description: Execute a shell command and return stdout, stderr, and exit code. Timeout after 30s by default.

tools.name: background
tools.description: Start a command in the background. Returns a process ID to check or kill later.

command.description: Shell command to run in background

tools.name: kill
tools.description: Kill a background process by its ID.

tools.name: compress
tools.description: Execute a command and return compressed output — strips ANSI codes, collapses blank lines, truncates to maxLines.

bricks.name: smartcontext
bricks.description: Composite brick — orchestrates smartread, cache, compress, tokenbudget, and overview to deliver optimal context within a token budget.

tools.name: load
tools.description: Auto-discover relevant files for a task, choose read modes, and return optimal context within budget.

tools.name: refresh
tools.description: Re-check files for changes and update context using cache to detect stale entries.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Show current context budget usage and cache statistics.

bricks.name: smartread
bricks.description: Intelligent file reading — multiple modes to minimize token usage.

tools.name: full
tools.description: Read entire file (fallback mode)

tools.name: map
tools.description: Read file structure only — function/class signatures, no bodies

tools.name: signatures
tools.description: Extract only exported function/class signatures

tools.name: imports
tools.description: Extract only import/require statements

tools.name: summary
tools.description: One-line summary per function/block (name + line count)

bricks.name: symbol
bricks.description: Symbol lookup in source files — find, get, bulk, body.

tools.name: find
tools.description: Find symbols by name (substring match) in a directory.

tools.name: get
tools.description: Get exact symbol match with signature.

tools.name: bulk
tools.description: Look up multiple symbols in one call.

tools.name: body
tools.description: Read the body of a symbol (lines startLine to endLine).

bricks.name: task
bricks.description: Task management for multi-agent workflows — create tasks, assign to agents, track status, mark complete.

tools.name: create
tools.description: Create a task with a title, description, and priority level.

description.description: Detailed description of what the task entails

priority.description: Priority level (1 = highest, higher numbers = lower priority)

tools.name: assign
tools.description: Assign a task to an agent by task ID and agent ID.

agentId.description: ID of the agent to assign the task to

tools.name: status
tools.description: Get task status and details by ID, or list all tasks filtered by status.

id.description: Task ID to retrieve (returns single task)

tools.name: complete
tools.description: Mark a task as complete with an optional result payload.

id.description: Task ID to mark as complete

result.description: Optional result data or summary from the task execution

bricks.name: textsearch
bricks.description: Text search and replace across files — regex search, multi-file replace, grouped results.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search for a text pattern across files in a directory. Returns matches with file, line number, and context.

pattern.description: Text pattern to search for (plain text)

glob.description: File glob filter (e.g. *.ts). Default: all supported files

tools.name: regex
tools.description: Search for a regex pattern across files. Supports capture groups.

tools.name: replace
tools.description: Search and replace text across multiple files. Returns preview of changes without applying by default.

apply.description: Actually apply changes (default false = dry run)

tools.name: grouped
tools.description: Search and group results by file, showing match count per file.

bricks.name: thinking
bricks.description: Structured reasoning chains — think step by step, branch alternatives, revise conclusions, summarize.

tools.name: think
tools.description: Add a reasoning step to the current chain. Each step has a thought and optional confidence score.

chainId.description: Chain ID to append to (default: current chain)

tools.name: branch
tools.description: Create a reasoning branch — explore an alternative line of thinking from the current point.

tools.name: revise
tools.description: Revise a previous reasoning step with new information. Keeps the original for audit trail.

tools.name: summarize
tools.description: Summarize the current reasoning chain into a structured conclusion.

bricks.name: tokenbudget
bricks.description: Token budget management — estimate and optimize token usage for AI agents.

tools.name: estimate
tools.description: Estimate token count for text (chars/4 heuristic, adjusted for code vs prose).

path.description: File path to read and estimate

tools.name: analyze
tools.description: Analyze token cost of a directory recursively, per-file breakdown sorted by cost.

tools.name: fill
tools.description: Given a token budget and file list, select files that fit using compression levels to maximize info.

tools.name: optimize
tools.description: Suggest how to read a set of files within a budget.

bricks.name: treesitter
bricks.description: Regex-based code indexer for TypeScript/JavaScript — parses symbols, imports, exports.

tools.name: index
tools.description: Index a directory: parse all TS/JS files and store symbols in memory.

dir.description: Absolute path to directory to index

tools.name: reindex
tools.description: Re-index a single file.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Return index status: file count, symbol count, languages.

tools.name: cleanup
tools.description: Clear the entire index.

tools.name: langs
tools.description: List supported languages.

bricks.name: validate
bricks.description: Validate data — JSON syntax, JSON Schema compliance, TypeScript type checking, lint rules.

tools.name: json
tools.description: Validate JSON syntax — check if a string is valid JSON and report parse errors.

text.description: The string to validate as JSON

tools.name: schema
tools.description: Validate data against a JSON Schema (subset: type, required, properties, items).

data.description: JSON string of the data to validate

schema.description: JSON Schema object (type, required, properties, items supported)

tools.name: types
tools.description: Check TypeScript type annotations in a file — find `any`, missing return types, implicit any.

path.description: Absolute path to the TypeScript file to analyse

tools.name: lint
tools.description: Apply simple lint rules to code — unused imports, console.log, TODO/FIXME count, debugger statements.

path.description: Absolute path to the source file to lint
